summaryForNext: All 9/9 changes MET, no PARTIAL/NOT MET goals. c008 (production operations) closed via a live deploy to the ssr AKS cluster, verified at https://forge-ssr.prometheusags.ai/healthz — this surfaced and fixed 4 real runtime bugs (Postgres 18 volume-mount layout, Kiln UUID/String decode mismatch, an axum route-registration panic, and a rate-limiter killing /healthz probes) that no prior unit/integration test had caught. One Definition-of-Done item is genuinely open: a fresh docs/audits/ re-audit of the P0/P1 paths has not been independently re-run this phase (relied on each change's own gate tests + the live deploy instead). Recommended next phase: run that fresh audit, then cut the corrected v1.0.1/re-tagged v1.0.0 release (verifying the Docker publish actually succeeds this time — c006 found the v1.0.0 publish silently failed), then close c008's remaining ssr-specific debt (backup/restore-drill/perf baselines) and c002's SCT/OIDC-identity follow-up.
